comment.body:
I fully expect a gap down and an attempt to fill the gap when the market opens. We’ll learn a lot from how strong breadth is able to rise during that - so that’s what I’ll be watching. 

I’ve been seeing breadth getting weaker and weaker as price has gone up last week. So my bias is still that we’ll have a weak rally tomorrow and eventually get price below 205 down to 202
